title: tarenna kivuensis
intro: Tarenna kivuensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Tarenna kivuensis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antimalarial agent. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, either on its own or in combination with other herbs, and is typically consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
